---
title: "Learn French"
image-height: 200px
type: grid
categories: false
sort: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
number-sections: false
format: html
# format: revealjs
---


::::{.columns style="align-items: center; padding: 10px; "}

:::::{.column .text-center width="40%"}

[![](inspire4/inspire4-cover.png){height="200px" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow: 5px 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);"}](inspire4.html)

[Inspire 4]{.text-primary style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1"}

:::::
::::

<br>


::::{.columns style="align-items: center; padding: 10px; "}

:::::{.column .text-center width="40%"}

[![](inspire3/inspire3-cover.png){height="200px" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow: 5px 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);"}](inspire3.html)

[Inspire 3]{.text-primary style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1"}

:::::
::::

<br>


::::{.columns style="align-items: center; padding: 10px; "}

:::::{.column .text-center width="40%"}

[![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1493564738392-d148cfbd6eda?q=80&w=640){height="200px" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow: 5px 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);"}](af-bordeaux.html)

[l'AF-Bordeaux]{.text-primary style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1"}

:::::
::::

<br>


::::{.columns style="align-items: center; padding: 10px; "}

:::::{.column .text-center width="40%"}

[![](defi4/defi4-cover.png){height="200px" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow: 5px 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);"}](defi4.html)

[Défi 4]{.text-primary style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1"}

:::::
::::

<br>


::::{.columns style="align-items: center; padding: 10px; "}

:::::{.column .text-center width="40%"}

[![](defi3/defi3-cover.png){height="200px" fig-align="center" style="box-shadow: 5px 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);"}](defi3.html)

[Défi 3]{.text-primary style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1"}

:::::
::::
